payload.label: dresser
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark stained wooden dresser with carved molding and multiple raised-panel drawers, small dark knobs and a polished finish; front is partially occluded by the bed in the foreground and the top surface is visible with small items — roughly 1.5 meters from the camera.
